subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of ‘Abdu’l‑Baha!  The tumult of the nations and the clamour of their peoples are certain and inevitable in the Day of the Manifestation of the Most Great Name
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء ضوضاء ملل و غوغای امم در یوم ظهور اسم اعظم محتوم و مسلمست
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion
